title: Area Result
description: Returns the area of a blob or defect.
notes:
The Area result is the total area of the blob or defect in pixels.  The area measurement may have a fractional component.

Statistics

For the Area result, the following statistics are available. AreaMax, AreaMean, AreaMin, AreaStdDev.  Please see Statistics in the Vision Guide manual for details about using statistics.
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Objects: ArcInspector, Blob, DefectFinder, LineInspector
